title: Odfjell lines up four newbuilds in Japan
content: Norwegian chemical tanker owner Odfjell is pressing ahead with its fleet renewal drive, securing four 40,000 dwt fully stainless-steel newbuildings from Japan. The Bergen-based group said it has agreed to acquire the vessels from a Japanese owner upon delivery from Kitanihon Shipbuilding, with handovers scheduled between the first quarter of 2027 and the second quarter …

title: JHI Steamship deepens tanker push with VLCC newbuild
content: Greek owner JHI Steamship has stepped further into the crude tanker arena, lining up a VLCC newbuilding in South Korea as part of a wider fleet build-out. The Athens-based company has disclosed an order for a 320,000 dwt vessel at Hanwha Ocean, with delivery slated for 2029. The move adds JHI to a growing list …
